docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,716.00 FILED BY PRESOTTO, PAULO AS TO DEFENDANT MANAR, AZREIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THERE BEING NO APPEARANCES BY PARTIES AT THE NOV-20-2023 PROGRESS REPORT HEARING, THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
